title: Rare Archive FAIR Criteria
description: FAIR scoring criteria for Rare AI Archive artifacts, extending Lattice Protocol base criteria.

archive_extensions.name: Ontology Grounding
archive_extensions.description: Artifact references valid patient categories, clinical tools, or disease identifiers from the Archive ontology
archive_extensions.check: All category_id, tool_id, disease_id references resolve to valid ontology entries

archive_extensions.name: HuggingFace Published
archive_extensions.description: Artifact is published to the wilhelm-foundation HuggingFace organization
archive_extensions.check: HuggingFace repo_id exists and is accessible

archive_extensions.name: aDNA Envelope Valid
archive_extensions.description: Artifact has valid aDNA envelope with rare_ namespace

archive_extensions.name: Cross-Reference Integrity
archive_extensions.description: All cross-references to other Archive artifacts are valid
archive_extensions.check: Referenced model_id, dataset_id, tool_id exist in their respective repos

archive_extensions.name: PHI Governance
archive_extensions.description: Datasets declare PHI status; models declare training data PHI status
archive_extensions.check: phi_status field present and valid for all dataset-type artifacts

archive_extensions.name: Training Provenance
archive_extensions.description: Models include complete training lineage (parent model, stage, data sources)
